_description: 7 market health drivers — migrated from market_drivers DB table definitions. The market_drivers table still stores associated articles and current_signal data; this file defines the canonical driver list and their indicator signals.
_deprecation_note: The market_drivers DB table is STILL ACTIVELY READ by api/index.ts for wiki pages, wiki detail, and dashboard stats. It holds rich markdown content served to the frontend. DO NOT DROP. This config file is the source of truth for driver search keywords and indicator signals only.

drivers.title: Interest & Mortgage Rates
drivers.description: Federal funds rate, 30-year mortgage rates, and their impact on housing demand and construction financing costs.

drivers.title: Labor Dynamics
drivers.description: Construction workforce availability, wage trends, immigration policy impacts, and skilled labor shortages.

drivers.title: Material & Energy Costs
drivers.description: Producer price index movements for key inputs: lumber, steel, cement, aggregates, energy, and petrochemicals.

drivers.title: Demand Visibility
drivers.description: Leading indicators of construction demand: housing starts, permits, ABI readings, backlog, and order books.

drivers.title: Government Infrastructure Spending
drivers.description: Federal and state infrastructure investment: IIJA/BIL disbursements, highway spending, and public works.

drivers.title: Credit Availability & Lending Standards
drivers.description: Bank lending conditions, commercial real estate credit, construction loan availability, and bond spreads.

drivers.title: GDP Growth & Consumer Confidence
drivers.description: Macroeconomic growth, consumer spending trends, and confidence indices affecting residential renovation and new construction.
